supabase_docs.note: SA code in Supabase conflicts with South Africa ISO-3166; Saudi Arabia named docs = 101; notable matches: SFDA Food Establishment Regulations, GSO Cosmetics Technical Regulation, GSO Technical Regulations for Electronics

GCC.gap: critical — 0/39 master regs matched to API; SA country code ambiguity; GSO/SFDA regs present but not linked

IL.gap: critical — 7 docs vs 26 needed; missing: MOC radio type approval, SI 1651 sunscreen, AMAR MD registration, PPL 1981 privacy

EG.gap: major — 69 docs exist (EG exact code) but 0 matched in master; likely different document set; missing: MOH cosmetics decree 425/2010, EDA MD registration, NTRA radio type approval, e-waste law

supabase_docs.note: Full name matches higher due to multi-country 'International, France... Morocco (MA)' rows

MA.gap: major — 98 docs present but none matched in master; missing: ANRT radio homologation, Décret 2-04-762 cosmetics, Loi 09-08 data protection, Loi 17-04 pharma code

supabase_docs.note: SA code = ambiguous (ISO-3166 = South Africa but Supabase uses it for South Africa correctly here); ICASA and SAHPRA docs confirmed present

ZA.gap: significant — ICASA + SAHPRA found; still missing: NRCS VC 8055, POPIA, NEMWA EPR, SANS 1557 sunscreen, SANS 1692 cosmetics, Foodstuffs Act 54/1972, VC 8052 toys

supabase_docs.note: NAFDAC Cosmetics Regulations doc confirmed present (country: Nigeria, NG)

NG.gap: significant — NAFDAC cosmetics found; missing: NCC radio type approval, SON safety, NESREA e-waste, NAFDAC sunscreen, NAFDAC MD registration, NAFDAC dietary supplements

supabase_docs.note: KE exact code = 1491 but likely includes unrelated entries (country code collision); 'Kenya' full name = 6 docs only

KE.gap: critical — KE code unreliable (1491 docs appear to be a code collision); only 6 Kenya-named docs; missing: CA Kenya type approval, PPB cosmetics, KEBS safety mark, NEMA e-waste 2021, Kenya DPA 2019, EAC EAS 758

CODEX.gap: partial — Codex generic docs exist; product-specific Codex standards for our product mix (cosmetics/electronics/toys) not applicable per master (marked low)

ISO.gap: significant — ISO 27001 and ETSI EN 303 645 confirmed; core cosmetics ISO standards (22716, 24444, 24442, 21148) absent; IEC 62368-1 absent; ISO 8124 absent

UNECE.gap: partial — WP.29 cybersecurity + software update regs present; most master UNECE entries marked not_applicable for our product mix (cosmetics/toys); automotive critical reg missing context

WADA.gap: minimal — WADA code present; 2 master matches (FOUND); most WADA entries in master marked not_applicable or low for our product mix

supabase_docs.note: OECD test guidelines for cosmetics/safety assessment (TG 404/406/428/439/455/457) not confirmed individually

OECD.gap: moderate — OECD policy docs present; OECD test guidelines for ingredient safety (cosmetics TGs) not individually indexed

key_issues: KE country code (KE=1491) appears to be a collision — actual Kenya docs = ~6; needs schema fix
SA country code used for South Africa in Supabase (correct ISO-3166) but conflicts with expected Saudi Arabia (GCC handled separately)
No dedicated CODEX/ISO/OECD/WADA/UNECE country codes in Supabase — international standards spread across 'International', 'XX', and EU rows
Cosmetics-specific ISO standards (22716, 24444, 24442, 24443, 21148) absent from legal_documents despite being critical for MENA markets
IEC 62368-1 (electronic safety, basis for ZA/NG/KE/EG/IL type approvals) absent
NAFDAC confirmed but other NAFDAC product-specific regs not individually indexed (sunscreen, MD, dietary supplements)
GCC/GSO technical regulations present at bloc level but individual SFDA/SASO product-level regs missing
